entry.title: New IDC HQ014712D0003 awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS (C2BMC) PROGRAM IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE END-TO-END MISSION COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK CONNECTIVITY BETWEEN THE BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM ELEMENTS, COMBATANT COMMANDERS, SERVICES AND AGENCIES. THE C2BMC SYSTEM LINKS TOGETHER THE EXTERNAL SENSORS AND WEAPONS OF INDEPENDENT ELEMENTS INTO A LAYERED MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM. THE CONTRACTOR IN THE PERFORMANCE OF THIS CONTRACT WILL DEVELOP, MODEL, FABRICATE, INTEGRATE, TEST, VERIFY, EVALUATE, VALIDATE, DOCUMENT, DELIVER, FIELD, TRAIN, OPERATE, SUSTAIN, AND SUPPORT UPDATES AND NEW CAPABILITIES TO THE C2BMC ELEMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

THE C2BMC SYSTEM LINKS TOGETHER THE EXTERNAL SENSORS AND WEAPONS OF INDEPENDENT ELEMENTS INTO A LAYERED MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM. THE CONTRACTOR IN THE PERFORMANCE OF THIS CONTRACT WILL DEVELOP, MODEL, FABRICATE, INTEGRATE, TEST, VERIFY, EVALUATE, VALIDATE, DOCUMENT, DELIVER, FIELD, TRAIN, OPERATE, SUSTAIN, AND SUPPORT UPDATES AND NEW CAPABILITIES TO THE C2BMC ELEMENT.

THE C2BMC SYSTEM LINKS TOGETHER THE EXTERNAL SENSORS AND WEAPONS OF INDEPENDENT ELEMENTS INTO A LAYERED MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM. entry.title: IDC HQ014712D0003 (P00002) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE CONTRACTOR SHALL DEVELOP THE NEXT SPIRAL DEVELOPMENT OF THE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS SYSTEM FOR THE MISSILE DEFENSE AGENCY'S BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM AS WELL AS PROVIDE THE OPERATIONS AND SUSTAINMENT AND TEST AND INTEGRATION OF THE SYSTEM. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD THE REVISED CDRLS AND ATTACHMENT 7.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HQ014712D0003 (P00003) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT PROVIDES FOR THE SPIRAL DEVELOPMENT OF THE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS PROGRAM FOR THE MISSILE DEFENSE AGENCY. THIS MODIFICATION UPDATES THE CONTRACT DATA REQUIREMENTS LIST AS WELL AS PROVIDES ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES TO THE BASE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HQ014712D0003 (P00004) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE CORE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS (C2BMC) PROGRAM IS AN ELEMENT OF THE BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS). THE C2BMC PROGRAM IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE END-TO-END MISSION COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK CONNECTIVITY BETWEEN BMDS ELEMENTS, COMBATANT COMMANDERS (COCOMS), SERVICES AND AGENCIES. THE C2BMC SYSTEM, THROUGH THE BMDS COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK (BCN), LINKS TOGETHER THE EXTERNAL SENSORS AND WEAPONS OF INDEPENDENT ELEMENTS INTO A LAYERED MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM SUCH THAT THE WHOLE IS FAR MORE CAPABLE AND ROBUST THAN THE SUM OF ITS PARTS -- THUS INCREASING THE CAPABILITY OF THE BMDS WITH GREATER PERFORMANCE AND DEFENSIVE COVERAGE. THE C2BMC SYSTEM ENABLES THE BMDS TO MANAGE COMPLEX THREATS -- NEAR SIMULTANEOUS ENEMY MISSILE SHOTS AIMED AT THEATER, REGIONAL, OR HOMELAND ASSETS. THE C2BMC SYSTEM INCLUDES THE COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK CAPABILITY THAT IS REQUIRED TO SUPPORT THE C2BMC FUNCTIONALITY, INFORMATION ASSURANCE (IA) ENHANCEMENTS (ARCHITECTURE, MONITORING, CORRELATION), AND THE MOVEMENT OF DATA AND INFORMATION WITHIN THE C2BMC SYSTEM¿S APPLICATIONS (I.E., THE NETWORK CAPABILITY SPECIFICALLY TIED TO THE EXECUTION OF THE CORE C2BMC CAPABILITY).
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE DD254 AND TO AMEND FAR CLAUSE 52.244-2 (SUBCONTRACTS).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HQ014712D0003 (P00005) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACT IS FOR THE FOLLOW-ON EFFORT FOR THE SPIRAL 8.2 DEVELOPMENT OF THE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS (C2BMC)SYSTEM FOR THE BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM. THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADMINISTRATIVELY UPDATE ATTACHMENT 7, DATA ASSERTION RIGHTS, AND MDA LOCAL CLAUSE H-31.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HQ014712D0003 (P00006) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT IS FOR THE SPIRAL DEVELOPMENT, OPERATIONS, SUSTAINMENT, DEPLOYMENT AND TESTING OF THE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS (C2BMC) SYSTEM FOR THE BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM. THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADMINISTRATIVELY CORRECT CLIN INFORMATION IN ORDER TO BE COMPLIANT WITH THE CONTRACTING SOFTWARE SYSTEM.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HQ014712D0003 (P00007) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE CORE COMMAND AND CONTROL, BATTLE MANAGEMENT AND COMMUNICATIONS (C2BMC) PROGRAM IS AN ELEMENT OF THE BALLISTIC MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM (BMDS). THE C2BMC PROGRAM IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE END-TO-END MISSION COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK CONNECTIVITY BETWEEN BMDS ELEMENTS, COMBATANT COMMANDERS (COCOMS), SERVICES AND AGENCIES. THE C2BMC SYSTEM, THROUGH THE BMDS COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK (BCN), LINKS TOGETHER THE EXTERNAL SENSORS AND WEAPONS OF INDEPENDENT ELEMENTS INTO A LAYERED MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM SUCH THAT THE WHOLE IS FAR MORE CAPABLE AND ROBUST THAN THE SUM OF ITS PARTS -- THUS INCREASING THE CAPABILITY OF THE BMDS WITH GREATER PERFORMANCE AND DEFENSIVE COVERAGE. THE C2BMC SYSTEM ENABLES THE BMDS TO MANAGE COMPLEX THREATS -- NEAR SIMULTANEOUS ENEMY MISSILE SHOTS AIMED AT THEATER, REGIONAL, OR HOMELAND ASSETS. THE C2BMC SYSTEM INCLUDES THE COMMUNICATIONS NETWORK CAPABILITY THAT IS REQUIRED TO SUPPORT THE C2BMC FUNCTIONALITY, INFORMATION ASSURANCE (IA) ENHANCEMENTS (ARCHITECTURE, MONITORING, CORRELATION), AND THE MOVEMENT OF DATA AND INFORMATION WITHIN THE C2BMC SYSTEM¿S APPLICATIONS (I.E., THE NETWORK CAPABILITY SPECIFICALLY TIED TO THE EXECUTION OF THE CORE C2BMC CAPABILITY).
THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REALIGN THE VALUE OF THE CLINS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
